DEPT. 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK E.MONTI 9:55 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, JACQUELINE WOODS. DEFT NOT PRESENT. ORAL & DOC. EVID PRESENTED. CASE SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELS, BRYAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY ST, #518, SF $1,686.40 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,111.40, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS ARE AWARDED PURSUANT TO COST BILL
